MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Albert Stowe Wood, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff.. Plaintiff Aulula Woldeab, present in court. , Order to Show Cause to Albert Stowe Wood, Esq., for failure to file Substitution of Attorney or file Proof of Service of Order Granting Motion to Withdraw is heard this day. Court ordered Case Dismissed at the request of Plaintiff in Propria Persona. Proceedings reported by: Valery Papale. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2004 Continued To Aug-19-04 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Alula Woldeab, present in court. Order to Show Cause to Albert Stowe Wood, Esq., for failure to file Substitution of Attorney or file Proof of Service or Order Granting Motion to Withdraw is heard this day. Court ordered Albert Stowe Wood, sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 8/19/2004 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Diana Padilla. (212)
